name: Lemon Tarragon Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons fresh lemon juice, or to taste
2 tablespoons finely chopped fresh tarragon leaves, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot of boiling salted water, blanch the green beans in 2 batches for 2 to 3 minutes, or until just tender.
2. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the beans as they are blanched to a bowl filled with ice and cold water. Drain the beans well and pat dry. The beans may be prepared up to this point up to 1 day ahead and kept chilled, covered.
3. Just before serving, in a large bowl toss together the beans, oil, lemon juice, tarragon, and salt and pepper to taste.
4. Serve the beans garnished with tarragon sprigs.
